```text
    49→  const [yesNoReasons, setYesNoReasons] = useState<Record<string, string>>({});
    50→
    51→  // Page navigation
    52→  const [currentPage, setCurrentPage] = useState(1);
    53→  const [totalPages, setTotalPages] = useState(1);
    54→
    55→  // Date formatting helpers
    56→  const formatDate = (dateString: string) => {
    57→    if (!dateString) return '';
    58→    return new Date(dateString).toLocaleDateString();
    59→  };
    60→
    61→  const formatDateForInput = (date: Date | undefined) => {
    62→    if (!date) return "";
    63→    const year = date.getFullYear();
    64→    const month = String(date.getMonth() + 1).padStart(2, "0");
    65→    const day = String(date.getDate()).padStart(2, "0");
    66→    return `${year}-${month}-${day}`;
    67→  };
    68→
    69→  const parseDateFromInput = (dateString: string) => {
    70→    if (!dateString) return undefined;
    71→    const [year, month, day] = dateString.split("-");
    72→    return new Date(parseInt(year), parseInt(month) - 1, parseInt(day));
    73→  };
    74→
    75→  useEffect(() => {
    76→    fetchForm();
    77→  }, [formId]);
    78→
    79→  const fetchForm = async () => {
    80→    try {
    81→      setLoading(true);
    82→      const data = await FormService.getPublicForm(formId, supabasePublic);
    83→
    84→      if (!data) {
    85→        setError('Form not found or not published');
    86→        return;
    87→      }
    88→
    89→      if (data.status === 'closed') {
    90→        setError('This form is no longer accepting responses');
    91→        return;
    92→      }
    93→
    94→      setForm(data);
    95→
    96→      // Calculate total pages
    97→      const maxPage = data.fields.reduce((max, field) => Math.max(max, field.page_number), 1);
    98→      setTotalPages(maxPage);
    99→
   100→      // Initialize form data with empty values
   101→      const initialData: Record<string, any> = {};
   102→      data.fields.forEach(field => {
   103→        if (field.field_type === 'checkbox') {
   104→          initialData[field.id] = [];
   105→        } else {
   106→          initialData[field.id] = '';
   107→        }
   108→      });
   109→      setFormData(initialData);
   110→    } catch (error) {
   111→      console.error('Error fetching form:', error);
   112→      setError('Failed to load form');
   113→    } finally {
   114→      setLoading(false);
   115→    }
   116→  };
   117→
   118→  const validateCurrentPage = (): boolean => {
   119→    const errors: Record<string, string> = {};
   120→
   121→    if (!form) return false;
   122→
   123→    // Validate only fields on current page (skip section headers and descriptions)
   124→    const fieldsOnCurrentPage = form.fields.filter(f => f.page_number === currentPage && !['section', 'description'].includes(f.field_type));
   125→    fieldsOnCurrentPage.forEach(field => {
   126→      if (field.required) {
   127→        const value = formData[field.id];
   128→        if (!value || (Array.isArray(value) && value.length === 0)) {
   129→          errors[field.id] = 'This field is required';
   130→        }
   131→      }
   132→
   133→      // Validate email fields
   134→      if (field.field_type === 'email' && formData[field.id]) {
   135→        const emailRegex = /^[^\s@]+@[^\s@]+\.[^\s@]+$/;
   136→        if (!emailRegex.test(formData[field.id])) {
   137→          errors[field.id] = 'Please enter a valid email address';
   138→        }
   139→      }
   140→    });
   141→
   142→    setValidationErrors(errors);
   143→    return Object.keys(errors).length === 0;
   144→  };
   145→
   146→  const handleNextPage = (e?: React.MouseEvent) => {
   147→    e?.preventDefault();
   148→    e?.stopPropagation();
   149→    if (validateCurrentPage()) {
   150→      setCurrentPage(prev => Math.min(prev + 1, totalPages));
   151→      setValidationErrors({});
   152→    }
   153→  };
   154→
   155→  const handlePreviousPage = (e?: React.MouseEvent) => {
   156→    e?.preventDefault();
   157→    e?.stopPropagation();
   158→    setCurrentPage(prev => Math.max(prev - 1, 1));
   159→    setValidationErrors({});
   160→  };
   161→
   162→  const validateForm = (): boolean => {
   163→    const errors: Record<string, string> = {};
   164→
   165→    if (!form) return false;
   166→
   167→    // Validate required fields (skip section headers and descriptions)
   168→    form.fields.filter(f => !['section', 'description'].includes(f.field_type)).forEach(field => {
   169→      if (field.required) {
   170→        const value = formData[field.id];
   171→        if (!value || (Array.isArray(value) && value.length === 0)) {
   172→          errors[field.id] = 'This field is required';
   173→        }
   174→      }
   175→
   176→      // Validate email fields
   177→      if (field.field_type === 'email' && formData[field.id]) {
   178→        const emailRegex = /^[^\s@]+@[^\s@]+\.[^\s@]+$/;
   179→        if (!emailRegex.test(formData[field.id])) {
   180→          errors[field.id] = 'Please enter a valid email address';
   181→        }
   182→      }
   183→
   184→      // Validate Yes/No reason fields for select fields
   185→      if (field.field_type === 'select' && formData[field.id]) {
   186→        const selectedValue = formData[field.id].toLowerCase();
   187→        if (field.require_yes_reason && selectedValue === 'yes') {
   188→          if (!yesNoReasons[field.id] || yesNoReasons[field.id].trim() === '') {
   189→            errors[field.id] = 'Please provide a reason for selecting "Yes"';
   190→          }
   191→        }
   192→        if (field.require_no_reason && selectedValue === 'no') {
   193→          if (!yesNoReasons[field.id] || yesNoReasons[field.id].trim() === '') {
   194→            errors[field.id] = 'Please provide a reason for selecting "No"';
   195→          }
   196→        }
   197→      }
   198→    });
   199→
   200→    setValidationErrors(errors);
   201→    return Object.keys(errors).length === 0;
   202→  };
   203→
   204→  const handleSubmit = async (e: React.FormEvent) => {
   205→    e.preventDefault();
   206→
   207→    if (!validateForm()) {
   208→      return;
   209→    }
   210→
   211→    try {
   212→      setSubmitting(true);
   213→
   214→      // Upload files to Supabase Storage
   215→      const responseDataWithFiles = { ...formData };
   216→
   217→      // Add Yes/No reasons to response data
   218→      for (const fieldId in yesNoReasons) {
   219→        if (yesNoReasons[fieldId]) {
   220→          responseDataWithFiles[`${fieldId}_reason`] = yesNoReasons[fieldId];
   221→        }
   222→      }
   223→
   224→      for (const fieldId in uploadedFiles) {
   225→        if (uploadedFiles[fieldId] && uploadedFiles[fieldId].length > 0) {
   226→          const fileUrls: string[] = [];
   227→
   228→          for (const file of uploadedFiles[fieldId]) {
   229→            const fileExt = file.name.split('.').pop();
   230→            const fileName = `${form!.id}/${fieldId}/${Date.now()}-${Math.random().toString(36).substring(7)}.${fileExt}`;
   231→
   232→            const { data, error } = await supabasePublic.storage
   233→              .from('form-attachments')
   234→              .upload(fileName, file);
   235→
   236→            if (error) {
   237→              console.error('Error uploading file:', error);
   238→              throw new Error(`Failed to upload ${file.name}`);
   239→            }
   240→
   241→            // Get public URL
   242→            const { data: urlData } = supabasePublic.storage
   243→              .from('form-attachments')
   244→              .getPublicUrl(fileName);
   245→
   246→            fileUrls.push(urlData.publicUrl);
   247→          }
   248→
   249→          // Store file URLs in response data
   250→          responseDataWithFiles[`${fieldId}_attachments`] = fileUrls;
   251→        }
   252→      }
   253→
   254→      await FormService.submitResponse(
   255→        {
   256→          form_id: form!.id,
   257→          response_data: responseDataWithFiles,
   258→        },
   259→        supabasePublic
   260→      );
   261→
   262→      // If thank you page is enabled, navigate to last page instead of showing full-page success
   263→      if (form?.enable_thank_you_page) {
   264→        setCurrentPage(totalPages);
   265→      }
   266→      setSubmitted(true);
   267→    } catch (error) {
   268→      console.error('Error submitting form:', error);
   269→      setError('Failed to submit form. Please try again.');
   270→    } finally {
   271→      setSubmitting(false);
   272→    }
   273→  };
   274→
   275→  const handleFieldChange = (fieldId: string, value: any) => {
   276→    setFormData(prev => ({ ...prev, [fieldId]: value }));
   277→    // Clear validation error when user starts typing
   278→    if (validationErrors[fieldId]) {
   279→      setValidationErrors(prev => {
   280→        const newErrors = { ...prev };
   281→        delete newErrors[fieldId];
   282→        return newErrors;
   283→      });
   284→    }
   285→  };
   286→
   287→  const handleCheckboxChange = (fieldId: string, option: string, checked: boolean) => {
   288→    setFormData(prev => {
   289→      const currentValues = prev[fieldId] || [];
   290→      if (checked) {
   291→        return { ...prev, [fieldId]: [...currentValues, option] };
   292→      } else {
   293→        return { ...prev, [fieldId]: currentValues.filter((v: string) => v !== option) };
   294→      }
   295→    });
   296→  };
   297→
   298→  const renderField = (field: any) => {
   299→    const hasError = validationErrors[field.id];
   300→
   301→    switch (field.field_type as FieldType) {
   302→      case 'text':
   303→      case 'email':
   304→      case 'number':
   305→        if (field.allow_multiple) {
   306→          const answers = multipleAnswers[field.id] || [''];
   307→          return (
   308→            <div key={field.id} className="space-y-2">
   309→              <Label htmlFor={field.id}>
   310→                <span dangerouslySetInnerHTML={{ __html: field.label }} style={{ whiteSpace: 'pre-wrap' }} />
   311→                {field.required && <span className="text-red-500 ml-1">*</span>}
   312→              </Label>
   313→              {answers.map((answer, index) => (
   314→                <div key={index} className="flex gap-2 items-center">
   315→                  <span className="text-gray-600 font-medium min-w-[24px]">{index + 1}.</span>
   316→                  <Input
   317→                    type={field.field_type}
   318→                    value={answer}
   319→                    onChange={(e) => {
   320→                      const newAnswers = [...answers];
   321→                      newAnswers[index] = e.target.value;
   322→                      setMultipleAnswers(prev => ({ ...prev, [field.id]: newAnswers }));
   323→                      handleFieldChange(field.id, newAnswers.filter(a => a.trim()));
   324→                    }}
   325→                    className={`auth-input flex-1 ${hasError ? 'border-red-500' : ''}`}
   326→                  />
   327→                  {index === answers.length - 1 && (
   328→                    <Button
   329→                      type="button"
   330→                      onClick={() => {
   331→                        setMultipleAnswers(prev => ({
   332→                          ...prev,
   333→                          [field.id]: [...answers, '']
   334→                        }));
   335→                      }}
   336→                      style={{ backgroundColor: '#3e8692', color: 'white' }}
   337→                      className="hover:opacity-90"
   338→                    >
   339→                      +
   340→                    </Button>
   341→                  )}
   342→                  {answers.length > 1 && (
   343→                    <Button
   344→                      type="button"
   345→                      variant="outline"
   346→                      onClick={() => {
   347→                        const newAnswers = answers.filter((_, i) => i !== index);
   348→                        setMultipleAnswers(prev => ({ ...prev, [field.id]: newAnswers }));
   349→                        handleFieldChange(field.id, newAnswers.filter(a => a.trim()));
   350→                      }}
   351→                      className="hover:bg-red-50 hover:text-red-700"
   352→                    >
   353→                      ×
   354→                    </Button>
   355→                  )}
   356→                </div>
   357→              ))}
   358→              {hasError && <p className="text-sm text-red-500">{hasError}</p>}
   359→            </div>
   360→          );
   361→        }
   362→        return (
   363→          <div key={field.id} className="space-y-2">
   364→            <Label htmlFor={field.id}>
   365→              <span dangerouslySetInnerHTML={{ __html: field.label }} style={{ whiteSpace: 'pre-wrap' }} />
   366→              {field.required && <span className="text-red-500 ml-1">*</span>}
   367→            </Label>
   368→            <Input
   369→              id={field.id}
   370→              type={field.field_type}
   371→              value={formData[field.id] || ''}
   372→              onChange={(e) => handleFieldChange(field.id, e.target.value)}
   373→              className={`auth-input ${hasError ? 'border-red-500' : ''}`}
   374→            />
   375→            {field.allow_attachments && (
   376→              <div className="space-y-2">
   377→                <div
   378→                  className="border-2 border-dashed border-gray-300 rounded-lg p-6 text-center bg-gray-50 hover:bg-gray-100 transition-colors cursor-pointer"
   379→                  onDragOver={(e) => {
   380→                    e.preventDefault();
   381→                    e.currentTarget.classList.add('border-[#3e8692]', 'bg-blue-50');
   382→                  }}
   383→                  onDragLeave={(e) => {
   384→                    e.currentTarget.classList.remove('border-[#3e8692]', 'bg-blue-50');
   385→                  }}
   386→                  onDrop={(e) => {
   387→                    e.preventDefault();
   388→                    e.currentTarget.classList.remove('border-[#3e8692]', 'bg-blue-50');
   389→                    const files = Array.from(e.dataTransfer.files);
   390→                    if (files.length > 0) {
   391→                      setUploadedFiles(prev => ({
   392→                        ...prev,
   393→                        [field.id]: [...(prev[field.id] || []), ...files]
   394→                      }));
   395→                    }
   396→                  }}
   397→                  onClick={() => {
   398→                    const input = document.getElementById(`file-${field.id}`) as HTMLInputElement;
   399→                    input?.click();
   400→                  }}
   401→                >
   402→                  <div className="flex items-center justify-center gap-2">
   403→                    <Upload className="w-4 h-4 text-gray-500" />
   404→                    <p className="text-sm text-gray-500">Drag files here or click to upload</p>
   405→                  </div>
   406→                  <Input
   407→                    id={`file-${field.id}`}
   408→                    type="file"
   409→                    multiple
   410→                    onChange={(e) => {
   411→                      const files = Array.from(e.target.files || []);
   412→                      if (files.length > 0) {
   413→                        setUploadedFiles(prev => ({
   414→                          ...prev,
   415→                          [field.id]: [...(prev[field.id] || []), ...files]
   416→                        }));
   417→                      }
   418→                    }}
   419→                    className="hidden"
   420→                  />
   421→                </div>
   422→                {uploadedFiles[field.id] && uploadedFiles[field.id].length > 0 && (
   423→                  <div className="space-y-1">
   424→                    {uploadedFiles[field.id].map((file, index) => (
   425→                      <div key={index} className="flex items-center justify-between text-sm bg-gray-50 p-2 rounded">
   426→                        <span className="text-gray-700">{file.name}</span>
   427→                        <Button
   428→                          type="button"
   429→                          variant="ghost"
   430→                          size="sm"
   431→                          onClick={() => {
   432→                            setUploadedFiles(prev => ({
   433→                              ...prev,
   434→                              [field.id]: prev[field.id].filter((_, i) => i !== index)
   435→                            }));
   436→                          }}
   437→                          className="h-6 w-6 p-0 hover:bg-red-50 hover:text-red-700"
   438→                        >
   439→                          ×
   440→                        </Button>
   441→                      </div>
   442→                    ))}
   443→                  </div>
   444→                )}
   445→              </div>
   446→            )}
   447→            {hasError && <p className="text-sm text-red-500">{hasError}</p>}
   448→          </div>
   449→        );
   450→
   451→      case 'textarea':
   452→        if (field.allow_multiple) {
   453→          const answers = multipleAnswers[field.id] || [''];
   454→          return (
   455→            <div key={field.id} className="space-y-2">
   456→              <Label htmlFor={field.id}>
   457→                <span dangerouslySetInnerHTML={{ __html: field.label }} style={{ whiteSpace: 'pre-wrap' }} />
   458→                {field.required && <span className="text-red-500 ml-1">*</span>}
   459→              </Label>
   460→              {answers.map((answer, index) => (
   461→                <div key={index} className="flex gap-2 items-start">
   462→                  <span className="text-gray-600 font-medium min-w-[24px] mt-2">{index + 1}.</span>
   463→                  <Textarea
   464→                    value={answer}
   465→                    onChange={(e) => {
   466→                      const newAnswers = [...answers];
   467→                      newAnswers[index] = e.target.value;
   468→                      setMultipleAnswers(prev => ({ ...prev, [field.id]: newAnswers }));
   469→                      handleFieldChange(field.id, newAnswers.filter(a => a.trim()));
   470→                    }}
   471→                    rows={4}
   472→                    className={`auth-input flex-1 ${hasError ? 'border-red-500' : ''}`}
   473→                  />
   474→                  {index === answers.length - 1 && (
   475→                    <Button
   476→                      type="button"
   477→                      onClick={() => {
   478→                        setMultipleAnswers(prev => ({
   479→                          ...prev,
   480→                          [field.id]: [...answers, '']
   481→                        }));
   482→                      }}
   483→                      style={{ backgroundColor: '#3e8692', color: 'white' }}
   484→                      className="hover:opacity-90"
   485→                    >
   486→                      +
   487→                    </Button>
   488→                  )}
   489→                  {answers.length > 1 && (
   490→                    <Button
   491→                      type="button"
   492→                      variant="outline"
   493→                      onClick={() => {
   494→                        const newAnswers = answers.filter((_, i) => i !== index);
   495→                        setMultipleAnswers(prev => ({ ...prev, [field.id]: newAnswers }));
   496→                        handleFieldChange(field.id, newAnswers.filter(a => a.trim()));
   497→                      }}
   498→                      className="hover:bg-red-50 hover:text-red-700"
   499→                    >
   500→                      ×
   501→                    </Button>
   502→                  )}
   503→                </div>
   504→              ))}
   505→              {hasError && <p className="text-sm text-red-500">{hasError}</p>}
   506→            </div>
   507→          );
   508→        }
   509→        return (
   510→          <div key={field.id} className="space-y-2">
   511→            <Label htmlFor={field.id}>
   512→              <span dangerouslySetInnerHTML={{ __html: field.label }} style={{ whiteSpace: 'pre-wrap' }} />
   513→              {field.required && <span className="text-red-500 ml-1">*</span>}
   514→            </Label>
   515→            <Textarea
   516→              id={field.id}
   517→              value={formData[field.id] || ''}
   518→              onChange={(e) => handleFieldChange(field.id, e.target.value)}
   519→              rows={4}
   520→              className={`auth-input ${hasError ? 'border-red-500' : ''}`}
   521→            />
   522→            {field.allow_attachments && (
   523→              <div className="space-y-2">
   524→                <div
   525→                  className="border-2 border-dashed border-gray-300 rounded-lg p-6 text-center bg-gray-50 hover:bg-gray-100 transition-colors cursor-pointer"
   526→                  onDragOver={(e) => {
   527→                    e.preventDefault();
   528→                    e.currentTarget.classList.add('border-[#3e8692]', 'bg-blue-50');
   529→                  }}
   530→                  onDragLeave={(e) => {
   531→                    e.currentTarget.classList.remove('border-[#3e8692]', 'bg-blue-50');
   532→                  }}
   533→                  onDrop={(e) => {
   534→                    e.preventDefault();
   535→                    e.currentTarget.classList.remove('border-[#3e8692]', 'bg-blue-50');
   536→                    const files = Array.from(e.dataTransfer.files);
   537→                    if (files.length > 0) {
   538→                      setUploadedFiles(prev => ({
   539→                        ...prev,
   540→                        [field.id]: [...(prev[field.id] || []), ...files]
   541→                      }));
   542→                    }
   543→                  }}
   544→                  onClick={() => {
   545→                    const input = document.getElementById(`file-${field.id}`) as HTMLInputElement;
   546→                    input?.click();
   547→                  }}
   548→                >
   549→                  <div className="flex items-center justify-center gap-2">
   550→                    <Upload className="w-4 h-4 text-gray-500" />
   551→                    <p className="text-sm text-gray-500">Drag files here or click to upload</p>
   552→                  </div>
   553→                  <Input
   554→                    id={`file-${field.id}`}
   555→                    type="file"
   556→                    multiple
   557→                    onChange={(e) => {
   558→                      const files = Array.from(e.target.files || []);
   559→                      if (files.length > 0) {
   560→                        setUploadedFiles(prev => ({
   561→                          ...prev,
   562→                          [field.id]: [...(prev[field.id] || []), ...files]
   563→                        }));
   564→                      }
   565→                    }}
   566→                    className="hidden"
   567→                  />
   568→                </div>
   569→                {uploadedFiles[field.id] && uploadedFiles[field.id].length > 0 && (
   570→                  <div className="space-y-1">
   571→                    {uploadedFiles[field.id].map((file, index) => (
   572→                      <div key={index} className="flex items-center justify-between text-sm bg-gray-50 p-2 rounded">
   573→                        <span className="text-gray-700">{file.name}</span>
   574→                        <Button
   575→                          type="button"
   576→                          variant="ghost"
   577→                          size="sm"
   578→                          onClick={() => {
   579→                            setUploadedFiles(prev => ({
   580→                              ...prev,
   581→                              [field.id]: prev[field.id].filter((_, i) => i !== index)
   582→                            }));
   583→                          }}
   584→                          className="h-6 w-6 p-0 hover:bg-red-50 hover:text-red-700"
   585→                        >
   586→                          ×
   587→                        </Button>
   588→                      </div>
   589→                    ))}
   590→                  </div>
   591→                )}
   592→              </div>
   593→            )}
   594→            {hasError && <p className="text-sm text-red-500">{hasError}</p>}
   595→          </div>
   596→        );
   597→
   598→      case 'date':
   599→        return (
   600→          <div key={field.id} className="space-y-2">
   601→            <Label htmlFor={field.id}>
   602→              <span dangerouslySetInnerHTML={{ __html: field.label }} style={{ whiteSpace: 'pre-wrap' }} />
   603→              {field.required && <span className="text-red-500 ml-1">*</span>}
   604→            </Label>
   605→            <Popover>
   606→              <PopoverTrigger asChild>
   607→                <Button
   608→                  variant="outline"
   609→                  className={`auth-input w-full justify-start text-left font-normal ${hasError ? 'border-red-500' : ''}`}
   610→                  style={{
   611→                    borderColor: hasError ? '#ef4444' : '#e5e7eb',
   612→                    backgroundColor: 'white',
   613→                    color: formData[field.id] ? '#111827' : '#9ca3af'
   614→                  }}
   615→                >
   616→                  <CalendarIcon className="mr-2 h-4 w-4" />
   617→                  {formData[field.id] ? formatDate(formData[field.id]) : "Select date"}
   618→                </Button>
   619→              </PopoverTrigger>
   620→              <PopoverContent className="w-auto p-0" align="start">
   621→                <Calendar
   622→                  mode="single"
   623→                  selected={parseDateFromInput(formData[field.id])}
   624→                  onSelect={(date) => handleFieldChange(field.id, formatDateForInput(date))}
   625→                  initialFocus
   626→                  classNames={{
   627→                    day_selected: "text-white hover:text-white focus:text-white",
   628→                  }}
   629→                  modifiersStyles={{
   630→                    selected: { backgroundColor: "#3e8692" }
   631→                  }}
   632→                />
   633→              </PopoverContent>
   634→            </Popover>
   635→            {hasError && <p className="text-sm text-red-500">{hasError}</p>}
   636→          </div>
   637→        );
   638→
   639→      case 'select':
   640→        const selectedValue = otherFieldSelected[field.id] ? '__OTHER__' : (formData[field.id] || '');
   641→        const showYesReason = field.require_yes_reason && selectedValue.toLowerCase() === 'yes';
   642→        const showNoReason = field.require_no_reason && selectedValue.toLowerCase() === 'no';
   643→
   644→        return (
   645→          <div key={field.id} className="space-y-2">
   646→            <Label htmlFor={field.id}>
   647→              <span dangerouslySetInnerHTML={{ __html: field.label }} style={{ whiteSpace: 'pre-wrap' }} />
   648→              {field.required && <span className="text-red-500 ml-1">*</span>}
   649→            </Label>
   650→            <Select
   651→              value={selectedValue}
   652→              onValueChange={(value) => {
   653→                if (value === '__OTHER__') {
   654→                  // Mark that Other is selected
   655→                  setOtherFieldSelected(prev => ({ ...prev, [field.id]: true }));
   656→                  handleFieldChange(field.id, otherFieldValues[field.id] || '');
   657→                } else {
   658→                  // Regular option selected
   659→                  setOtherFieldSelected(prev => ({ ...prev, [field.id]: false }));
   660→                  handleFieldChange(field.id, value);
   661→                  // Clear the other field value
   662→                  setOtherFieldValues(prev => {
   663→                    const newValues = { ...prev };
   664→                    delete newValues[field.id];
   665→                    return newValues;
   666→                  });
   667→
   668→                  // Clear reason if switching away from Yes/No
   669→                  if (value.toLowerCase() !== 'yes' && value.toLowerCase() !== 'no') {
   670→                    setYesNoReasons(prev => {
   671→                      const newReasons = { ...prev };
   672→                      delete newReasons[field.id];
   673→                      return newReasons;
   674→                    });
   675→                  }
   676→                }
   677→              }}
   678→            >
   679→              <SelectTrigger className={`auth-input ${hasError ? 'border-red-500' : ''}`}>
   680→                <SelectValue placeholder="Select an option" />
   681→              </SelectTrigger>
   682→              <SelectContent>
   683→                {field.options?.map((option: string) => (
   684→                  <SelectItem key={option} value={option}>
   685→                    {option}
   686→                  </SelectItem>
   687→                ))}
   688→                {field.include_other && (
   689→                  <SelectItem value="__OTHER__">Other</SelectItem>
   690→                )}
   691→              </SelectContent>
   692→            </Select>
   693→            {otherFieldSelected[field.id] && (
   694→              <Input
   695→                placeholder="Please specify..."
   696→                value={otherFieldValues[field.id] || ''}
   697→                onChange={(e) => {
   698→                  const value = e.target.value;
   699→                  setOtherFieldValues(prev => ({ ...prev, [field.id]: value }));
   700→                  // Store the actual value in formData
   701→                  handleFieldChange(field.id, value);
   702→                }}
   703→                className="auth-input mt-2"
   704→              />
   705→            )}
   706→            {showYesReason && (
   707→              <div className="mt-2">
   708→                <Textarea
   709→                  id={`${field.id}-yes-reason`}
   710→                  value={yesNoReasons[field.id] || ''}
   711→                  onChange={(e) => {
   712→                    setYesNoReasons(prev => ({ ...prev, [field.id]: e.target.value }));
   713→                  }}
   714→                  className="auth-input"
   715→                  rows={3}
   716→                />
   717→              </div>
   718→            )}
   719→            {showNoReason && (
   720→              <div className="mt-2">
   721→                <Textarea
   722→                  id={`${field.id}-no-reason`}
   723→                  value={yesNoReasons[field.id] || ''}
   724→                  onChange={(e) => {
   725→                    setYesNoReasons(prev => ({ ...prev, [field.id]: e.target.value }));
   726→                  }}
   727→                  className="auth-input"
   728→                  rows={3}
   729→                />
   730→              </div>
   731→            )}
   732→            {hasError && <p className="text-sm text-red-500">{hasError}</p>}
   733→          </div>
   734→        );
   735→
   736→      case 'radio':
   737→        return (
   738→          <div key={field.id} className="space-y-2">
   739→            <Label>
   740→              <span dangerouslySetInnerHTML={{ __html: field.label }} style={{ whiteSpace: 'pre-wrap' }} />
   741→              {field.required && <span className="text-red-500 ml-1">*</span>}
   742→            </Label>
   743→            <RadioGroup value={formData[field.id] || ''} onValueChange={(value) => handleFieldChange(field.id, value)}>
   744→              <div className="space-y-2">
   745→                {field.options?.map((option: string) => (
   746→                  <div key={option} className="flex items-center space-x-2">
   747→                    <RadioGroupItem value={option} id={`${field.id}-${option}`} />
   748→                    <Label htmlFor={`${field.id}-${option}`} className="font-normal cursor-pointer">
   749→                      {option}
   750→                    </Label>
   751→                  </div>
   752→                ))}
   753→              </div>
   754→            </RadioGroup>
   755→            {hasError && <p className="text-sm text-red-500">{hasError}</p>}
   756→          </div>
   757→        );
   758→
   759→      case 'checkbox':
   760→        return (
   761→          <div key={field.id} className="space-y-2">
   762→            <Label>
   763→              <span dangerouslySetInnerHTML={{ __html: field.label }} style={{ whiteSpace: 'pre-wrap' }} />
   764→              {field.required && <span className="text-red-500 ml-1">*</span>}
   765→            </Label>
   766→            <div className="space-y-2">
   767→              {field.options?.map((option: string) => (
   768→                <div key={option} className="flex items-center space-x-2">
   769→                  <Checkbox
   770→                    id={`${field.id}-${option}`}
   771→                    checked={formData[field.id]?.includes(option) || false}
   772→                    onCheckedChange={(checked) => handleCheckboxChange(field.id, option, checked as boolean)}
   773→                  />
   774→                  <Label htmlFor={`${field.id}-${option}`} className="font-normal cursor-pointer">
   775→                    {option}
   776→                  </Label>
   777→                </div>
   778→              ))}
   779→              {field.include_other && (
   780→                <>
   781→                  <div className="flex items-center space-x-2">
   782→                    <Checkbox
   783→                      id={`${field.id}-__OTHER__`}
   784→                      checked={formData[field.id]?.includes('__OTHER__') || false}
   785→                      onCheckedChange={(checked) => {
   786→                        handleCheckboxChange(field.id, '__OTHER__', checked as boolean);
   787→                        if (!checked) {
   788→                          // Clear the other field value when unchecked
   789→                          setOtherFieldValues(prev => ({ ...prev, [field.id]: '' }));
   790→                        }
   791→                      }}
   792→                    />
   793→                    <Label htmlFor={`${field.id}-__OTHER__`} className="font-normal cursor-pointer">
   794→                      Other
   795→                    </Label>
   796→                  </div>
   797→                  {formData[field.id]?.includes('__OTHER__') && (
   798→                    <Input
   799→                      placeholder="Please specify..."
   800→                      value={otherFieldValues[field.id] || ''}
   801→                      onChange={(e) => setOtherFieldValues(prev => ({ ...prev, [field.id]: e.target.value }))}
   802→                      className="ml-6"
   803→                    />
   804→                  )}
   805→                </>
   806→              )}
   807→            </div>
   808→            {hasError && <p className="text-sm text-red-500">{hasError}</p>}
   809→          </div>
   810→        );
   811→
   812→      case 'section':
   813→        return (
   814→          <div key={field.id} className="py-4">
   815→            <div className="font-bold text-gray-900 border-b-2 border-gray-300 pb-2" style={{ whiteSpace: 'pre-wrap' }} dangerouslySetInnerHTML={{ __html: field.label }} />
   816→          </div>
   817→        );
   818→
   819→      case 'description':
   820→        return (
   821→          <div key={field.id} className="py-2">
   822→            <div className="text-gray-600" style={{ whiteSpace: 'pre-wrap' }} dangerouslySetInnerHTML={{ __html: field.label }} />
   823→          </div>
   824→        );
   825→
   826→      case 'link':
   827→        try {
   828→          const linkUrl = (Array.isArray(field.options) && field.options.length > 0) ? field.options[0] : '';
   829→          const linkTitle = field.label ? String(field.label).replace(/<[^>]*>/g, '').trim() || 'Embedded content' : 'Embedded content';
   830→
   831→          if (!linkUrl) {
   832→            return null;
   833→          }
   834→
   835→          return (
   836→            <div key={field.id} className="space-y-2">
   837→              {field.label && typeof field.label === 'string' && (
   838→                <div className="font-medium text-gray-900" dangerouslySetInnerHTML={{ __html: field.label }} style={{ whiteSpace: 'pre-wrap' }} />
   839→              )}
   840→              <div className="w-full border rounded-lg overflow-hidden bg-gray-50">
   841→                <iframe
   842→                  src={linkUrl}
   843→                  className="w-full"
   844→                  style={{ height: '600px', border: 'none' }}
   845→                  title={linkTitle}
   846→                  allowFullScreen
   847→                />
   848→              </div>
   849→            </div>
   850→          );
   851→        } catch (error) {
   852→          console.error('Error rendering link field:', error);
   853→          return null;
   854→        }
   855→
   856→      default:
   857→        return null;
   858→    }
   859→  };
   860→
   861→  // Loading state
   862→  if (loading) {
   863→    return (
   864→      <div className="min-h-screen bg-white flex items-center justify-center">
   865→        <div className="text-center">
   866→          <Loader className="h-12 w-12 animate-spin text-[#3e8692] mx-auto mb-4" />
   867→          <p className="text-gray-600 text-lg font-medium">Loading form...</p>
   868→        </div>
   869→      </div>
   870→    );
   871→  }
   872→
   873→  // Error state
   874→  if (error) {
   875→    return (
   876→      <div className="min-h-screen bg-white flex items-center justify-center px-6">
   877→        <div className="text-center max-w-md">
   878→          <div className="flex justify-center mb-6">
   879→            <Image src="/images/logo.png" alt="Logo" width={60} height={60} className="rounded-xl" />
   880→          </div>
   881→          <div className="rounded-full bg-red-50 p-4 w-20 h-20 mx-auto mb-6 flex items-center justify-center">
   882→            <FileText className="h-10 w-10 text-red-500" />
   883→          </div>
   884→          <h2 className="text-3xl font-bold text-gray-900 mb-4">Form Not Available</h2>
   885→          <p className="text-lg text-gray-600 leading-relaxed">{error}</p>
   886→        </div>
   887→      </div>
   888→    );
   889→  }
   890→
   891→  // Success state - only show full-page success if thank you page is NOT enabled
   892→  if (submitted && !form?.enable_thank_you_page) {
   893→    return (
   894→      <div className="min-h-screen bg-white flex items-center justify-center px-6">
   895→        <div className="text-center max-w-md">
   896→          <div className="flex justify-center mb-6">
   897→            <Image src="/images/logo.png" alt="Logo" width={60} height={60} className="rounded-xl" />
   898→          </div>
   899→          <div className="rounded-full bg-green-50 p-4 w-20 h-20 mx-auto mb-6 flex items-center justify-center">
   900→            <CheckCircle2 className="h-10 w-10 text-green-600" />
   901→          </div>
   902→          <h2 className="text-3xl font-bold text-gray-900 mb-4">Thank you!</h2>
   903→          <p className="text-lg text-gray-600 leading-relaxed">Your response has been submitted successfully.</p>
   904→        </div>
   905→      </div>
   906→    );
   907→  }
   908→
   909→  // Form state
   910→  return (
   911→    <div className="min-h-screen bg-white">
   912→      <div className="max-w-2xl mx-auto px-6 py-16">
   913→        {/* Logo and Title */}
   914→        <div className="text-center mb-12">
   915→          <div className="flex justify-center mb-6">
   916→            <Image src="/images/logo.png" alt="Logo" width={60} height={60} className="rounded-xl" />
   917→          </div>
   918→          <h1 className="text-4xl font-bold text-gray-900 mb-4">{form?.name}</h1>
   919→          {form?.description && (
   920→            <p className="text-lg text-gray-600 leading-relaxed max-w-xl mx-auto">{form.description}</p>
   921→          )}
   922→        </div>
   923→
   924→        {/* Form Content */}
   925→        <div className="max-w-xl mx-auto">
   926→          <form onSubmit={handleSubmit} className="space-y-8">
   927→              {/* Page indicator */}
   928→              {totalPages > 1 && (
   929→                <div className="flex justify-center mb-8">
   930→                  <div className="flex gap-2">
   931→                    {Array.from({ length: totalPages }, (_, i) => i + 1).map((pageNum) => (
   932→                      <div
   933→                        key={pageNum}
   934→                        className={`h-2 rounded-full transition-all duration-300 ${
   935→                          pageNum === currentPage
   936→                            ? 'bg-[#3e8692] w-8'
   937→                            : pageNum < currentPage
   938→                            ? 'bg-[#3e8692] opacity-30 w-2'
   939→                            : 'bg-gray-300 w-2'
   940→                        }`}
   941→                      />
   942→                    ))}
   943→                  </div>
   944→                </div>
   945→              )}
   946→
   947→              {/* Form fields for current page */}
   948→              {form?.fields
   949→                .filter(field => field.page_number === currentPage)
   950→                .map(field => renderField(field))}
   951→
   952→              {/* Navigation buttons - hide when on thank you page after submission */}
   953→              {!(form?.enable_thank_you_page && currentPage === totalPages && submitted) && (
   954→                <div className="pt-8 flex gap-4 justify-center items-center">
   955→                  {currentPage > 1 && !submitted && (
   956→                    <Button
   957→                      type="button"
   958→                      onClick={handlePreviousPage}
   959→                      className="px-6 h-12 text-base font-medium rounded-lg bg-white border border-gray-300 text-gray-700 hover:bg-gray-50 hover:border-gray-400 transition-all flex items-center gap-2"
   960→                    >
   961→                      <ChevronLeft className="h-5 w-5" />
   962→                      Previous
   963→                    </Button>
   964→                  )}
   965→                  {/* Show Next button or Submit button based on current page and thank you page setting */}
   966→                  {(form?.enable_thank_you_page && currentPage < totalPages - 1) || (!form?.enable_thank_you_page && currentPage < totalPages) ? (
   967→                    <Button
   968→                      type="button"
   969→                      onClick={handleNextPage}
   970→                      className="px-6 h-12 text-base font-medium rounded-lg bg-[#3e8692] hover:bg-[#2d6570] text-white transition-all flex items-center gap-2"
   971→                    >
   972→                      Next
   973→                      <ChevronRight className="h-5 w-5" />
   974→                    </Button>
   975→                  ) : !submitted && (
   976→                    <Button
   977→                      type="submit"
   978→                      disabled={submitting}
   979→                      className="px-6 h-12 text-base font-medium rounded-lg bg-[#3e8692] hover:bg-[#2d6570] text-white transition-all disabled:opacity-50 disabled:cursor-not-allowed flex items-center gap-2"
   980→                    >
   981→                      {submitting ? (
   982→                        <>
   983→                          <Loader className="h-5 w-5 animate-spin" />
   984→                          Submitting...
   985→                        </>
   986→                      ) : (
   987→                        <>
   988→                          Submit
   989→                          <ChevronRight className="h-5 w-5" />
   990→                        </>
   991→                      )}
   992→                    </Button>
   993→                  )}
   994→                </div>
   995→              )}
   996→
   997→            </form>
   998→          </div>
   999→        </div>
  1000→      </div>
  1001→  );
  1002→}
  1003→
  1004→
```
</details></tool-use>

```text
     1→'use client';
     2→
     3→import React, { useState, useEffect, useRef } from 'react';
     4→import { Card, CardContent, CardHeader, CardTitle, CardDescription } from '@/components/ui/card';
     5→import { Button } from '@/components/ui/button';
     6→import { Input } from '@/components/ui/input';
     7→import { Label } from '@/components/ui/label';
     8→import { Skeleton } from '@/components/ui/skeleton';
     9→import { User, Mail, AtSign, Camera, Loader2, Save, ArrowLeft, MessageSquare, CheckCircle, XCircle, RefreshCw } from 'lucide-react';
    10→import { supabase } from '@/lib/supabase';
    11→import { useAuth } from '@/contexts/AuthContext';
    12→import { useToast } from '@/hooks/use-toast';
    13→import { ProtectedRoute } from '@/components/auth/ProtectedRoute';
    14→import { useRouter } from 'next/navigation';
    15→
    16→export default function SettingsPage() {
    17→  return (
    18→    <ProtectedRoute>
    19→      <SettingsContent />
    20→    </ProtectedRoute>
    21→  );
    22→}
    23→
    24→function SettingsContent() {
    25→  const { user, userProfile, refreshUserProfile } = useAuth();
    26→  const { toast } = useToast();
    27→  const router = useRouter();
    28→  const fileInputRef = useRef<HTMLInputElement>(null);
    29→
    30→  const [loading, setLoading] = useState(true);
    31→  const [saving, setSaving] = useState(false);
    32→  const [uploadingPhoto, setUploadingPhoto] = useState(false);
    33→
    34→  // Telegram webhook state
    35→  const [webhookStatus, setWebhookStatus] = useState<{
    36→    url: string;
    37→    has_custom_certificate: boolean;
    38→    pending_update_count: number;
    39→    last_error_date?: number;
    40→    last_error_message?: string;
    41→  } | null>(null);
    42→  const [webhookLoading, setWebhookLoading] = useState(false);
    43→  const [webhookActionLoading, setWebhookActionLoading] = useState(false);
    44→
    45→  const [formData, setFormData] = useState({
    46→    name: '',
    47→    email: '',
    48→    telegram_id: '',
    49→    x_id: '',
    50→    profile_photo_url: '',
    51→  });
    52→
    53→  useEffect(() => {
    54→    if (userProfile) {
    55→      setFormData({
    56→        name: userProfile.name || '',
    57→        email: userProfile.email || '',
    58→        telegram_id: userProfile.telegram_id || '',
    59→        x_id: userProfile.x_id || '',
    60→        profile_photo_url: userProfile.profile_photo_url || '',
    61→      });
    62→      setLoading(false);
    63→
    64→      // Fetch webhook status for admins
    65→      if (userProfile.role === 'admin' || userProfile.role === 'super_admin') {
    66→        fetchWebhookStatus();
    67→      }
    68→    }
    69→  }, [userProfile]);
    70→
    71→  const fetchWebhookStatus = async () => {
    72→    setWebhookLoading(true);
    73→    try {
    74→      const { data: { session } } = await supabase.auth.getSession();
    75→      const response = await fetch('/api/telegram/webhook/manage', {
    76→        headers: {
    77→          'Authorization': `Bearer ${session?.access_token || 'token'}`
    78→        }
    79→      });
    80→      const data = await response.json();
    81→      if (data.result) {
    82→        setWebhookStatus(data.result);
    83→      }
    84→    } catch (error) {
    85→      console.error('Error fetching webhook status:', error);
    86→    } finally {
    87→      setWebhookLoading(false);
    88→    }
    89→  };
    90→
    91→  const handleRegisterWebhook = async () => {
    92→    setWebhookActionLoading(true);
    93→    try {
    94→      const { data: { session } } = await supabase.auth.getSession();
    95→      const response = await fetch('/api/telegram/webhook/manage', {
    96→        method: 'POST',
    97→        headers: {
    98→          'Content-Type': 'application/json',
    99→          'Authorization': `Bearer ${session?.access_token || 'token'}`
   100→        },
   101→        body: JSON.stringify({ action: 'register' })
   102→      });
   103→      const data = await response.json();
   104→
   105→      if (data.success) {
   106→        toast({
   107→          title: 'Webhook registered',
   108→          description: `Telegram webhook connected to ${data.webhookUrl}`,
   109→        });
   110→        fetchWebhookStatus();
   111→      } else {
   112→        toast({
   113→          title: 'Registration failed',
   114→          description: data.error || 'Failed to register webhook',
   115→          variant: 'destructive',
   116→        });
   117→      }
   118→    } catch (error) {
   119→      console.error('Error registering webhook:', error);
   120→      toast({
   121→        title: 'Error',
   122→        description: 'Failed to register webhook',
   123→        variant: 'destructive',
   124→      });
   125→    } finally {
   126→      setWebhookActionLoading(false);
   127→    }
   128→  };
   129→
   130→  const handleDeleteWebhook = async () => {
   131→    setWebhookActionLoading(true);
   132→    try {
   133→      const { data: { session } } = await supabase.auth.getSession();
   134→      const response = await fetch('/api/telegram/webhook/manage', {
   135→        method: 'POST',
   136→        headers: {
   137→          'Content-Type': 'application/json',
   138→          'Authorization': `Bearer ${session?.access_token || 'token'}`
   139→        },
   140→        body: JSON.stringify({ action: 'delete' })
   141→      });
   142→      const data = await response.json();
   143→
   144→      if (data.success) {
   145→        toast({
   146→          title: 'Webhook disconnected',
   147→          description: 'Telegram webhook has been removed',
   148→        });
   149→        fetchWebhookStatus();
   150→      } else {
   151→        toast({
   152→          title: 'Disconnect failed',
   153→          description: data.error || 'Failed to disconnect webhook',
   154→          variant: 'destructive',
   155→        });
   156→      }
   157→    } catch (error) {
   158→      console.error('Error deleting webhook:', error);
   159→      toast({
   160→        title: 'Error',
   161→        description: 'Failed to disconnect webhook',
   162→        variant: 'destructive',
   163→      });
   164→    } finally {
   165→      setWebhookActionLoading(false);
   166→    }
   167→  };
   168→
   169→  const getUserInitials = (name: string) => {
   170→    return name
   171→      .split(' ')
   172→      .map(word => word.charAt(0).toUpperCase())
   173→      .join('')
   174→      .slice(0, 2);
   175→  };
   176→
   177→  const handlePhotoUpload = async (e: React.ChangeEvent<HTMLInputElement>) => {
   178→    const file = e.target.files?.[0];
   179→    if (!file || !user) return;
   180→
   181→    // Validate file type
   182→    if (!file.type.startsWith('image/')) {
   183→      toast({
   184→        title: 'Invalid file type',
   185→        description: 'Please upload an image file.',
   186→        variant: 'destructive',
   187→      });
   188→      return;
   189→    }
   190→
   191→    // Validate file size (max 5MB)
   192→    if (file.size > 5 * 1024 * 1024) {
   193→      toast({
   194→        title: 'File too large',
   195→        description: 'Please upload an image smaller than 5MB.',
   196→        variant: 'destructive',
   197→      });
   198→      return;
   199→    }
   200→
   201→    setUploadingPhoto(true);
   202→
   203→    try {
   204→      // Create unique filename
   205→      const fileExt = file.name.split('.').pop();
   206→      const fileName = `${user.id}/${Date.now()}.${fileExt}`;
   207→
   208→      // Upload to Supabase Storage
   209→      const { data: uploadData, error: uploadError } = await supabase.storage
   210→        .from('profile-photos')
   211→        .upload(fileName, file, {
   212→          cacheControl: '3600',
   213→          upsert: true,
   214→        });
   215→
   216→      if (uploadError) {
   217→        // If bucket doesn't exist, try campaign-report-files as fallback
   218→        const fallbackFileName = `profile-photos/${user.id}/${Date.now()}.${fileExt}`;
   219→        const { data: fallbackData, error: fallbackError } = await supabase.storage
   220→          .from('campaign-report-files')
   221→          .upload(fallbackFileName, file, {
   222→            cacheControl: '3600',
   223→            upsert: true,
   224→          });
   225→
   226→        if (fallbackError) {
   227→          throw fallbackError;
   228→        }
   229→
   230→        // Get public URL from fallback bucket
   231→        const { data: { publicUrl } } = supabase.storage
   232→          .from('campaign-report-files')
   233→          .getPublicUrl(fallbackFileName);
   234→
   235→        // Update user profile with new photo URL
   236→        const { error: updateError } = await supabase
   237→          .from('users')
   238→          .update({ profile_photo_url: publicUrl, updated_at: new Date().toISOString() })
   239→          .eq('id', user.id);
   240→
   241→        if (updateError) throw updateError;
   242→
   243→        setFormData(prev => ({ ...prev, profile_photo_url: publicUrl }));
   244→      } else {
   245→        // Get public URL
   246→        const { data: { publicUrl } } = supabase.storage
   247→          .from('profile-photos')
   248→          .getPublicUrl(fileName);
   249→
   250→        // Update user profile with new photo URL
   251→        const { error: updateError } = await supabase
   252→          .from('users')
   253→          .update({ profile_photo_url: publicUrl, updated_at: new Date().toISOString() })
   254→          .eq('id', user.id);
   255→
   256→        if (updateError) throw updateError;
   257→
   258→        setFormData(prev => ({ ...prev, profile_photo_url: publicUrl }));
   259→      }
   260→
   261→      await refreshUserProfile();
   262→
   263→      toast({
   264→        title: 'Photo updated',
   265→        description: 'Your profile photo has been updated successfully.',
   266→      });
   267→    } catch (error) {
   268→      console.error('Error uploading photo:', error);
   269→      toast({
   270→        title: 'Upload failed',
   271→        description: 'Failed to upload profile photo. Please try again.',
   272→        variant: 'destructive',
   273→      });
   274→    } finally {
   275→      setUploadingPhoto(false);
   276→    }
   277→  };
   278→
   279→  const handleSave = async () => {
   280→    if (!user) return;
   281→
   282→    setSaving(true);
   283→
   284→    try {
   285→      const { error } = await supabase
   286→        .from('users')
   287→        .update({
   288→          name: formData.name.trim(),
   289→          telegram_id: formData.telegram_id.trim() || null,
   290→          x_id: formData.x_id.trim() || null,
   291→          updated_at: new Date().toISOString(),
   292→        })
   293→        .eq('id', user.id);
   294→
   295→      if (error) throw error;
   296→
   297→      await refreshUserProfile();
   298→
   299→      toast({
   300→        title: 'Settings saved',
   301→        description: 'Your profile has been updated successfully.',
   302→      });
   303→    } catch (error) {
   304→      console.error('Error saving settings:', error);
   305→      toast({
   306→        title: 'Save failed',
   307→        description: 'Failed to save settings. Please try again.',
   308→        variant: 'destructive',
   309→      });
   310→    } finally {
   311→      setSaving(false);
   312→    }
   313→  };
   314→
   315→  if (loading) {
   316→    return (
   317→      <div className="min-h-[calc(100vh-64px)] w-full bg-gray-50 py-8">
   318→        <div className="w-full max-w-2xl mx-auto">
   319→          <div className="space-y-6">
   320→            <div className="flex items-center gap-4">
   321→              <Skeleton className="h-10 w-10 rounded-md" />
   322→              <div>
   323→                <Skeleton className="h-8 w-48 mb-2" />
   324→                <Skeleton className="h-5 w-72" />
   325→              </div>
   326→            </div>
   327→            <Card>
   328→              <CardHeader>
   329→                <Skeleton className="h-6 w-32" />
   330→              </CardHeader>
   331→              <CardContent className="space-y-6">
   332→                <div className="flex items-center space-x-6">
   333→                  <Skeleton className="h-24 w-24 rounded-full" />
   334→                  <Skeleton className="h-10 w-32" />
   335→                </div>
   336→                <div className="space-y-4">
   337→                  <Skeleton className="h-10 w-full" />
   338→                  <Skeleton className="h-10 w-full" />
   339→                  <Skeleton className="h-10 w-full" />
   340→                  <Skeleton className="h-10 w-full" />
   341→                </div>
   342→              </CardContent>
   343→            </Card>
   344→          </div>
   345→        </div>
   346→      </div>
   347→    );
   348→  }
   349→
   350→  return (
   351→    <div className="min-h-[calc(100vh-64px)] w-full bg-gray-50 py-8">
   352→      <div className="w-full max-w-2xl mx-auto">
   353→        <div className="space-y-6">
   354→          {/* Header */}
   355→          <div className="flex items-center gap-4">
   356→            <Button
   357→              variant="outline"
   358→              size="icon"
   359→              onClick={() => router.back()}
   360→              className="h-10 w-10"
   361→            >
   362→              <ArrowLeft className="h-4 w-4" />
   363→            </Button>
   364→            <div>
   365→              <h2 className="text-2xl font-bold text-gray-900">Settings</h2>
   366→              <p className="text-gray-600">Manage your account settings and profile</p>
   367→            </div>
   368→          </div>
   369→
   370→          {/* Profile Card */}
   371→          <Card>
   372→            <CardHeader>
   373→              <CardTitle>Profile Information</CardTitle>
   374→              <CardDescription>Update your personal information and profile photo</CardDescription>
   375→            </CardHeader>
   376→            <CardContent className="space-y-6">
   377→              {/* Profile Photo */}
   378→              <div className="flex items-center space-x-6">
   379→                <div className="relative">
   380→                  {formData.profile_photo_url ? (
   381→                    <div className="w-24 h-24 rounded-full overflow-hidden">
   382→                      <img
   383→                        src={formData.profile_photo_url}
   384→                        alt="Profile"
   385→                        className="w-full h-full object-cover"
   386→                        onError={(e) => {
   387→                          const target = e.target as HTMLImageElement;
   388→                          target.style.display = 'none';
   389→                          target.nextElementSibling?.classList.remove('hidden');
   390→                        }}
   391→                      />
   392→                      <div className="w-24 h-24 bg-gradient-to-br from-[#3e8692] to-[#2d6470] rounded-full flex items-center justify-center absolute top-0 left-0 hidden">
   393→                        <span className="text-white font-bold text-2xl">
   394→                          {getUserInitials(formData.name || formData.email)}
   395→                        </span>
   396→                      </div>
   397→                    </div>
   398→                  ) : (
   399→                    <div className="w-24 h-24 bg-gradient-to-br from-[#3e8692] to-[#2d6470] rounded-full flex items-center justify-center">
   400→                      <span className="text-white font-bold text-2xl">
   401→                        {getUserInitials(formData.name || formData.email)}
   402→                      </span>
   403→                    </div>
   404→                  )}
   405→                  {uploadingPhoto && (
   406→                    <div className="absolute inset-0 bg-black/50 rounded-full flex items-center justify-center">
   407→                      <Loader2 className="h-6 w-6 text-white animate-spin" />
   408→                    </div>
   409→                  )}
   410→                </div>
   411→                <div>
   412→                  <input
   413→                    type="file"
   414→                    ref={fileInputRef}
   415→                    onChange={handlePhotoUpload}
   416→                    accept="image/*"
   417→                    className="hidden"
   418→                  />
   419→                  <Button
   420→                    type="button"
   421→                    variant="outline"
   422→                    onClick={() => fileInputRef.current?.click()}
   423→                    disabled={uploadingPhoto}
   424→                  >
   425→                    <Camera className="h-4 w-4 mr-2" />
   426→                    {uploadingPhoto ? 'Uploading...' : 'Change Photo'}
   427→                  </Button>
   428→                  <p className="text-sm text-gray-500 mt-2">JPG, PNG or GIF. Max 5MB.</p>
   429→                </div>
   430→              </div>
   431→
   432→              {/* Form Fields */}
   433→              <div className="space-y-4">
   434→                {/* Name */}
   435→                <div className="space-y-2">
   436→                  <Label htmlFor="name">Name</Label>
   437→                  <div className="relative">
   438→                    <User className="absolute left-3 top-1/2 transform -translate-y-1/2 h-4 w-4 text-gray-400" />
   439→                    <Input
   440→                      id="name"
   441→                      value={formData.name}
   442→                      onChange={(e) => setFormData(prev => ({ ...prev, name: e.target.value }))}
   443→                      placeholder="Enter your name"
   444→                      className="pl-10 auth-input"
   445→                    />
   446→                  </div>
   447→                </div>
   448→
   449→                {/* Email (read-only) */}
   450→                <div className="space-y-2">
   451→                  <Label htmlFor="email">Email</Label>
   452→                  <div className="relative">
   453→                    <Mail className="absolute left-3 top-1/2 transform -translate-y-1/2 h-4 w-4 text-gray-400" />
   454→                    <Input
   455→                      id="email"
   456→                      value={formData.email}
   457→                      disabled
   458→                      className="pl-10 auth-input bg-gray-50 text-gray-500"
   459→                    />
   460→                  </div>
   461→                  <p className="text-sm text-gray-500">Email cannot be changed</p>
   462→                </div>
   463→
   464→                {/* Telegram ID */}
   465→                <div className="space-y-2">
   466→                  <Label htmlFor="telegram_id">Telegram Username</Label>
   467→                  <div className="relative">
   468→                    <AtSign className="absolute left-3 top-1/2 transform -translate-y-1/2 h-4 w-4 text-gray-400" />
   469→                    <Input
   470→                      id="telegram_id"
   471→                      value={formData.telegram_id}
   472→                      onChange={(e) => setFormData(prev => ({ ...prev, telegram_id: e.target.value }))}
   473→                      placeholder="Enter your Telegram username"
   474→                      className="pl-10 auth-input"
   475→                    />
   476→                  </div>
   477→                </div>
   478→
   479→                {/* X (Twitter) ID */}
   480→                <div className="space-y-2">
   481→                  <Label htmlFor="x_id">X (Twitter) Username</Label>
   482→                  <div className="relative">
   483→                    <AtSign className="absolute left-3 top-1/2 transform -translate-y-1/2 h-4 w-4 text-gray-400" />
   484→                    <Input
   485→                      id="x_id"
   486→                      value={formData.x_id}
   487→                      onChange={(e) => setFormData(prev => ({ ...prev, x_id: e.target.value }))}
   488→                      placeholder="Enter your X username"
   489→                      className="pl-10 auth-input"
   490→                    />
   491→                  </div>
   492→                </div>
   493→              </div>
   494→
   495→              {/* Save Button */}
   496→              <div className="flex justify-end pt-4 border-t">
   497→                <Button
   498→                  onClick={handleSave}
   499→                  disabled={saving}
   500→                  className="hover:opacity-90"
   501→                  style={{ backgroundColor: '#3e8692', color: 'white' }}
   502→                >
   503→                  {saving ? (
   504→                    <>
   505→                      <Loader2 className="h-4 w-4 mr-2 animate-spin" />
   506→                      Saving...
   507→                    </>
   508→                  ) : (
   509→                    <>
   510→                      <Save className="h-4 w-4 mr-2" />
   511→                      Save Changes
   512→                    </>
   513→                  )}
   514→                </Button>
   515→              </div>
   516→            </CardContent>
   517→          </Card>
   518→
   519→          {/* Account Info Card */}
   520→          <Card>
   521→            <CardHeader>
   522→              <CardTitle>Account Information</CardTitle>
   523→              <CardDescription>View your account details</CardDescription>
   524→            </CardHeader>
   525→            <CardContent className="space-y-4">
   526→              <div className="flex items-center justify-between py-2">
   527→                <span className="text-sm text-gray-600">Role</span>
   528→                <span className={`inline-flex items-center px-2.5 py-0.5 rounded-full text-xs font-medium ${
   529→                  userProfile?.role === 'super_admin'
   530→                    ? 'bg-purple-100 text-purple-800'
   531→                    : 'bg-blue-100 text-blue-800'
   532→                }`}>
   533→                  {userProfile?.role === 'super_admin'
   534→                    ? 'Super Admin'
   535→                    : userProfile?.role
   536→                      ? userProfile.role.charAt(0).toUpperCase() + userProfile.role.slice(1)
   537→                      : 'Unknown'}
   538→                </span>
   539→              </div>
   540→              <div className="flex items-center justify-between py-2 border-t">
   541→                <span className="text-sm text-gray-600">Status</span>
   542→                <span className={`inline-flex items-center px-2.5 py-0.5 rounded-full text-xs font-medium ${
   543→                  userProfile?.is_active ? 'bg-green-100 text-green-800' : 'bg-red-100 text-red-800'
   544→                }`}>
   545→                  {userProfile?.is_active ? 'Active' : 'Inactive'}
   546→                </span>
   547→              </div>
   548→              <div className="flex items-center justify-between py-2 border-t">
   549→                <span className="text-sm text-gray-600">Member Since</span>
   550→                <span className="text-sm font-medium text-gray-900">
   551→                  {userProfile?.created_at
   552→                    ? new Date(userProfile.created_at).toLocaleDateString('en-US', {
   553→                        year: 'numeric',
   554→                        month: 'long',
   555→                        day: 'numeric',
   556→                      })
   557→                    : 'Unknown'}
   558→                </span>
   559→              </div>
   560→            </CardContent>
   561→          </Card>
   562→
   563→          {/* Telegram Integration Card - Admin Only */}
   564→          {(userProfile?.role === 'admin' || userProfile?.role === 'super_admin') && (
   565→            <Card>
   566→              <CardHeader>
   567→                <CardTitle className="flex items-center gap-2">
   568→                  <MessageSquare className="h-5 w-5" />
   569→                  Telegram Integration
   570→                </CardTitle>
   571→                <CardDescription>
   572→                  Connect Telegram to automatically track message activity in CRM pipeline group chats
   573→                </CardDescription>
   574→              </CardHeader>
   575→              <CardContent className="space-y-4">
   576→                {webhookLoading ? (
   577→                  <div className="flex items-center gap-2 text-gray-500">
   578→                    <Loader2 className="h-4 w-4 animate-spin" />
   579→                    <span>Checking webhook status...</span>
   580→                  </div>
   581→                ) : (
   582→                  <>
   583→                    {/* Connection Status */}
   584→                    <div className="flex items-center justify-between py-2">
   585→                      <span className="text-sm text-gray-600">Webhook Status</span>
   586→                      {webhookStatus?.url ? (
   587→                        <span className="inline-flex items-center gap-1.5 px-2.5 py-0.5 rounded-full text-xs font-medium bg-green-100 text-green-800">
   588→                          <CheckCircle className="h-3 w-3" />
   589→                          Connected
   590→                        </span>
   591→                      ) : (
   592→                        <span className="inline-flex items-center gap-1.5 px-2.5 py-0.5 rounded-full text-xs font-medium bg-gray-100 text-gray-600">
   593→                          <XCircle className="h-3 w-3" />
   594→                          Not Connected
   595→                        </span>
   596→                      )}
   597→                    </div>
   598→
   599→                    {/* Webhook URL if connected */}
   600→                    {webhookStatus?.url && (
   601→                      <div className="py-2 border-t">
   602→                        <span className="text-sm text-gray-600 block mb-1">Webhook URL</span>
   603→                        <code className="text-xs bg-gray-100 px-2 py-1 rounded break-all">
   604→                          {webhookStatus.url}
   605→                        </code>
   606→                      </div>
   607→                    )}
   608→
   609→                    {/* Pending Updates */}
   610→                    {webhookStatus?.url && webhookStatus.pending_update_count > 0 && (
   611→                      <div className="flex items-center justify-between py-2 border-t">
   612→                        <span className="text-sm text-gray-600">Pending Updates</span>
   613→                        <span className="text-sm font-medium text-amber-600">
   614→                          {webhookStatus.pending_update_count}
   615→                        </span>
   616→                      </div>
   617→                    )}
   618→
   619→                    {/* Last Error */}
   620→                    {webhookStatus?.last_error_message && (
   621→                      <div className="py-2 border-t">
   622→                        <span className="text-sm text-red-600 block mb-1">Last Error</span>
   623→                        <p className="text-xs text-red-500">
   624→                          {webhookStatus.last_error_message}
   625→                          {webhookStatus.last_error_date && (
   626→                            <span className="text-gray-400 ml-2">
   627→                              ({new Date(webhookStatus.last_error_date * 1000).toLocaleString()})
   628→                            </span>
   629→                          )}
   630→                        </p>
   631→                      </div>
   632→                    )}
   633→
   634→                    {/* Actions */}
   635→                    <div className="flex items-center gap-3 pt-4 border-t">
   636→                      {webhookStatus?.url ? (
   637→                        <>
   638→                          <Button
   639→                            variant="outline"
   640→                            size="sm"
   641→                            onClick={fetchWebhookStatus}
   642→                            disabled={webhookLoading}
   643→                          >
   644→                            <RefreshCw className={`h-4 w-4 mr-2 ${webhookLoading ? 'animate-spin' : ''}`} />
   645→                            Refresh Status
   646→                          </Button>
   647→                          <Button
   648→                            variant="destructive"
   649→                            size="sm"
   650→                            onClick={handleDeleteWebhook}
   651→                            disabled={webhookActionLoading}
   652→                          >
   653→                            {webhookActionLoading ? (
   654→                              <Loader2 className="h-4 w-4 mr-2 animate-spin" />
   655→                            ) : (
   656→                              <XCircle className="h-4 w-4 mr-2" />
   657→                            )}
   658→                            Disconnect
   659→                          </Button>
   660→                        </>
   661→                      ) : (
   662→                        <Button
   663→                          onClick={handleRegisterWebhook}
   664→                          disabled={webhookActionLoading}
   665→                          className="hover:opacity-90"
   666→                          style={{ backgroundColor: '#3e8692', color: 'white' }}
   667→                        >
   668→                          {webhookActionLoading ? (
   669→                            <Loader2 className="h-4 w-4 mr-2 animate-spin" />
   670→                          ) : (
   671→                            <MessageSquare className="h-4 w-4 mr-2" />
   672→                          )}
   673→                          Connect Telegram Webhook
   674→                        </Button>
   675→                      )}
   676→                    </div>
   677→
   678→                    {/* Help Text */}
   679→                    <div className="pt-4 border-t">
   680→                      <p className="text-xs text-gray-500">
   681→                        <strong>How it works:</strong> Once connected, your Telegram bot will notify this app whenever
   682→                        messages are sent in group chats. Add the chat ID to any CRM opportunity to automatically
   683→                        track message activity.
   684→                      </p>
   685→                      <p className="text-xs text-gray-500 mt-2">
   686→                        <strong>Requirements:</strong> Your Telegram bot must be added to each group chat and have
   687→                        permission to see messages (disable privacy mode in BotFather or make it an admin).
   688→                      </p>
   689→                    </div>
   690→                  </>
   691→                )}
   692→              </CardContent>
   693→            </Card>
   694→          )}
   695→        </div>
   696→      </div>
   697→    </div>
   698→  );
   699→}
   700→
```
